F

FAMILY_ISSUES - Static variable in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SpecializationTags
Family issues counseling specialization.
FeedbackRepository - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
Repository for the Firestore 'feedback' collection.
FeedbackRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.FeedbackRepository
Initialises the repository with a reference to the 'feedback' collection.
FeedbackRepository.OnFeedbackCheckCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for checking whether feedback already exists for an appointment.
FeedbackRepository.OnFeedbackSubmittedCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for feedback submission operations.
FeedbackService - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
Represents an anonymous post-session feedback submission.
FeedbackService() - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.FeedbackService
Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.
FeedbackService(String, int, String) - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.FeedbackService
Constructs a FeedbackService with all required fields.
fromSlots(String, List<TimeSlot>) - Static method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilitySchedule
Builds a schedule from a flat list of TimeSlot objects.
